questions.question: Discuss the significance of the Dartmouth Conference (1956) in the history of AI.
keyPoints: Key attendees: McCarthy, Minsky, Newell, Simon
Set optimistic goals for the field
Led to major funding and research programs

questions.question: Explain the causes and effects of the AI Winters. What lessons can be learned?
keyPoints: First Winter (1974-80): Perceptron limits, broken promises
Second Winter (1987-93): Expert system failures, Lisp collapse
Lessons: Realistic expectations, robust systems needed

questions.question: Describe the contributions of Alan Turing to Artificial Intelligence.
What were expert systems? Name two examples and explain why they eventually declined.
Trace the evolution of AI from the Logic Theorist (1956) to Deep Learning (2012).
